title: Designing a RAG Architecture for Large Documents
summary: A practical breakdown of building a scalable RAG pipeline for large, unstructured documents — covering chunking strategies, embedding models, retrieval routing, and prompt design.

title: Building a GenAI-powered KYC Pipeline on Azure
summary: How I designed and deployed an automated KYC and financial credibility analysis system using Azure AI Document Intelligence, Azure OpenAI, and hybrid vector retrieval — in 4 days.

title: MeetIQ: Building an Agentic Meeting Intelligence System
summary: How I built a multi-agent pipeline using LangGraph and Vertex AI to transform meeting transcripts into actionable tasks, summaries, and Google Calendar events — and placed Top 50 in an 18,000-participant APAC hackathon.
